name: Easy Chilled Cream of Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Can undiluted condensed chicken broth (10 1/2 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, sauté sliced onions in oil until wilted.
2. Add the broth; bring to a full rolling boil.
3. Remove from heat; whisk in the potato flakes, evaporated milk, and pepper.
4. Cover and chill or return to the saucepan and heat through.
5. Garnish with chopped green onion.
6. Makes 4 servings.
Note: For a smoother chilled soup, puree the chilled base in a blender or food processor; thinning it with small amounts of chicken broth or water.
